nodes.name: CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md
nodes.summary: Contributor code of conduct adapted from the Contributor Covenant v1.3.0, outlining expected behaviors, reporting guidelines, and maintainer responsibilities for the project community.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Project overview and getting-started guide covering features, modules, setup instructions for Spring/Boot/Cloud applications, message file conventions, configuration properties, Actuator endpoint, and contribution guidelines.

nodes.name: developer-guide.md
nodes.summary: Comprehensive developer guide detailing the architecture, class hierarchy, and module-by-module breakdown of all six microsphere-i18n modules with code examples and key concept explanations.

nodes.name: mvnw.cmd
nodes.summary: Apache Maven Wrapper startup script for Windows that downloads the configured Maven distribution, validates its SHA-256 checksum, extracts it, and invokes Maven commands.

nodes.name: pom.xml
nodes.summary: Parent POM for the microsphere-i18n multi-module project defining seven sub-modules, project metadata, SCM configuration, licensing information, and build properties targeting Java 17.

nodes.name: release-notes.md
nodes.summary: Cumulative release notes documenting changes across versions 0.2.4 through 0.2.11, including new features, dependency updates, bug fixes, and build workflow enhancements.
